repair_description: Produced mount_receipt.json for the original CID-SID-MID pipeline build. Mount receipt includes commit-at-mount, commit-at-completion, SHA256 integrity hashes for all 29 source files (16 created + 13 modified), and HEIR validation result (5/5 checks PASS).

created.description: Mount receipt with commit-level integrity proof and HEIR validation for the CID-SID-MID pipeline build.
